name: Maple Syrup Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a ten-inch pie pan and place the pie crust in it.
2. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Position a rack in the middle of the oven.
3. In a bowl, beat the eggs until combined. Add the sugar and mix well. Stir in the maple syrup, butter, salt, vanilla, and pecans. Pour the filling into the pie crust.
4. Transfer the pie to the oven. Bake for 10 minutes at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
5. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and bake for an additional 30-35 minutes or until the filling is set. Gently shake the pan; the center should remain firm.
6. Allow the pie to cool completely at room temperature.
7. To make in advance, wrap the cooled pie in plastic wrap, then in heavy-duty aluminum foil. Press the foil against the pie. Freeze for up to two months.
8. Defrost the wrapped pie at room temperature. Uncover the pie and warm it in a 300 degrees F (150 degrees C) oven for ten minutes before serving.
